race.description: Friday 5 June Corey Brown Cup Maiden Plate
race.comment: YESSPECIALLY (10) debuts for the sharp Paul Snowden yard and impressed easily winning a recent 1007m trial at this track. Has Looker aboard and finds a winnable assignment. The speedy SEVEN WONDERS (9) is race fit and a threat. Went well at Newcastle before being beaten less than 2L over this distance at Muswellbrook. He will skip over from the awkward gate and is sure to give a big sight. BONJOUR BILL (1) resumed here in solid order on a slow surface and didn't handle the heavy track at Coffs Harbour following. Has a low gate, and the blinkers are applied for the first time. Quick improvement is on the cards. SATURN RISING (8) also draws well and did enough at Grafton on debut to go into the mix.
